prerequisites: Clazar API credentials (a Client ID and Client Secret) generated from the Clazar API access settings page.

authMethods.name: Client credentials (Client ID and Client Secret)
authMethods.summary: Authenticate using a Client ID and Client Secret pair generated in Clazar. Both are required and are provided to the connector as the client_id and client_secret fields.

setupSteps.title: Generate Clazar API credentials
setupSteps.body: Sign in to Clazar and open the API access page in settings (https://app.clazar.io/settings/api-access). Select Create API Credentials, choose Airbyte in the Integration Type dropdown, then copy the generated Client ID and Client Secret.

setupSteps.title: Configure the connector
setupSteps.body: Enter the Client ID into the client_id field and the Client Secret into the client_secret field. Both fields are required. Save the source to complete setup.
